summary: Reviewed the inbox runner and paired delegate together as an end-to-end readonly smoke path. Verdict: needs_revision. The wrapper is well-aligned with the evidence-backed/read-only contract and applies conservative success gating, but the pair has a material contract mismatch: the runner documents and reports readonly behavior, yet the delegate performs local Excel writing in non-dry-run mode. Additionally, the delegate can report aggregate success even when OCR dependencies are unavailable and OCR fallback may have been needed for image-only PDFs, so end-to-end evidence remains conditional rather than fully robust.
